lint.note: 2 pre-existing complexity warnings (not errors); no new issues introduced

appliedUpdates.description: Added CSS class documentation: .form-row-fixed is the non-collapsible flexbox class used for the From+Amount row (flex-wrap:nowrap by CSS default, not explicitly set). Wallet section now inside <form id='form'> as .wallet-group, not a separate .wallet-section. MEV Protection button is inside #result div (hidden until first compare).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or update the stale 'Key Code Locations' and 'Sender Removal Checklist' sections in the mission AGENTS.md. After remove-sender-field and reorder-form-layout completed, the line numbers (914-916, ~988, etc.) and sender-related action items are historical artifacts. If line references are kept for future workers, they should be updated to reflect post-mission line numbers, or removed if the mission is complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer for remove-sender-field noted that AGENTS.md still references 'Sender input: line 914-916 (must be removed entirely)' and 'senderInput declaration: ~line 988' which no longer correspond to reality after commit 705741f.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the class name suggestion in AGENTS.md: 'e.g., .form-row-inline' should be updated to reflect the actual class used: '.form-row-fixed'. Future workers referencing AGENTS.md to understand form layout CSS would look for the wrong class name.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer for reorder-form-layout noted: AGENTS.md says 'e.g., .form-row-inline' but actual implementation in src/server.ts uses '.form-row-fixed'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'Write Tests First (Red Phase)' step to explicitly note two exception cases: (1) client-side-only HTML/CSS layout changes where no new JS logic is added — in this case, manual browser verification suffices and running the red phase is not applicable; (2) verification/audit features that write tests for already-implemented behavior — in this case, tests are expected to pass immediately and the red phase is intentionally skipped. The current skill guidance qualifies this somewhat but the exception clauses should be more prominent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two separate features (reorder-form-layout and integration-verification) correctly deviated from the red phase. Both reviewers noted the skill's current qualification is buried and somewhat ambiguous. This is a systemic pattern across multiple workers on the same mission.

rejectedObservations.observation: Nested .wallet-row divs (outer contains connect button + inner #walletConnected). Pre-existing complexity, not introduced by this change.
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing issue not introduced by this feature. Not actionable for this milestone.
